name: Olive Garden Ravioletti in Mushroom/Walnut Cr2
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute mushrooms and walnuts until the mushrooms are golden brown.
3. Add cream and cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
4. Turn off the heat and add pepper and Parmesan when the cream stops simmering.
5. Stir until the sauce is smooth. Do not boil.
6. Serve pasta with the sauce.
